changes.value:
Create a FocusScope component that manages entity focus (which entity is selected for action) independently from DOM input focus.

**FocusScope component:**
```tsx
interface FocusScopeProps {
  moniker: string;
  commands: CommandDef[];
  children: ReactNode;
  as?: keyof JSX.IntrinsicElements; // default "div"
}
```

FocusScope wraps its children in:
1. `CommandScopeProvider` with the given commands
2. A DOM element that:
   - Sets entity focus on click and contextmenu (not on input focus)
   - Attaches `onContextMenu={useContextMenu()}`
   - Adds `data-focused` attribute when this moniker matches the focused entity
   - Adds `data-moniker` attribute for debugging/CSS

**EntityFocusContext:**
```tsx
interface EntityFocusContextValue {
  focusedMoniker: string | null;
  setFocus: (moniker: string | null) => void;
}
```

Provided once at the App level. Any FocusScope reads from this context and writes to it on click.

**Key behaviors:**
- Click on a FocusScope sets entity focus to its moniker
- Right-click on a FocusScope sets entity focus AND shows context menu
- Clicking an input/textarea inside a FocusScope does NOT change entity focus (only the outermost FocusScope receives the click)
- `useFocusedEntity()` hook returns the current moniker — usable by command palette, vim commands, status bar
- CSS can target `[data-focused]` for visual ring/highlight
- Entity focus is cleared when clicking the backdrop or empty board area

**Interaction with input focus:**
- FocusScope does NOT call `element.focus()` or set tabIndex
- Input focus is managed by individual input components as usual
- Entity focus and input focus are completely independent state

- [ ] Create lib/entity-focus-context.tsx with EntityFocusProvider + useFocusedEntity hook
- [ ] Create components/focus-scope.tsx that combines CommandScopeProvider + entity focus + context menu
- [ ] Provide EntityFocusProvider in App.tsx
- [ ] Clear entity focus on backdrop click

Tests (entity-focus-context.test.tsx):
- [ ] `useFocusedEntity returns null initially` — no entity focused by default
- [ ] `setFocus updates focusedMoniker` — set "task:abc", read back "task:abc"
- [ ] `setFocus(null) clears focus` — clear after setting, read null
- [ ] `useFocusedEntity throws outside provider` — verify error

Tests (focus-scope.test.tsx):
- [ ] `click sets entity focus to moniker` — render FocusScope with moniker "task:abc", click, verify focusedMoniker
- [ ] `right-click sets entity focus and calls show_context_menu` — fire contextmenu, verify both focus set and invoke called
- [ ] `clicking input inside does not change entity focus` — render input inside FocusScope, click input, entity focus unchanged
- [ ] `nested FocusScope: inner click sets inner moniker` — card > tag nesting, click tag, verify tag moniker focused
- [ ] `nested FocusScope: inner right-click stops propagation` — right-click tag, card context menu not triggered
- [ ] `data-focused attribute set when focused` — set focus to moniker, verify attribute present
- [ ] `data-focused attribute absent when not focused` — different moniker focused, verify attribute absent
- [ ] `data-moniker attribute always set` — verify attribute has the moniker value
- [ ] `commands are provided to CommandScopeProvider` — verify commands resolve through scope chain
- [ ] `backdrop click clears entity focus` — click outside all FocusScopes, verify null
Frontend: FocusScope component + entity focus context
